cc:Work.dc:title: Box - UniversalBox
cc:Work.dc:description:
Box with various options for different styles and lids
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes UniversalBox --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=2 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=2 --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 --Lid_brim_height=1.0 --Lid_brim_spacing=0.15 --Lid_fang_size=1.0 --Lid_handle_height=8.0 --Lid_height=6.5 --Lid_play=0.1 --Lid_style=ontop --Stackable_angle=60 --Stackable_bottom_stabilizers=0.0 --Stackable_height=1 --Stackable_holedistance=1 --Stackable_width=3 --bottom_edge=s --h=68 --outside=1 --qr_code=1 --thickness=3.0 --top_edge=S --x=104 --y=56.8 Command line short: boxes UniversalBox --Lid_height=6.5 --Lid_style=ontop --Stackable_height=1 --Stackable_width=3 --bottom_edge=s --h=68 --qr_code=1 --top_edge=S --x=104 --y=56.8
